role_summary: the fraud risk analyst identifies, assesses, and mitigates fraud risks within business  operations.
responsibilities: • analyze transactions and data for fraud indicators   • conduct fraud risk assessments and mo nitoring   • develop fraud detection and prevention frameworks   • investigate suspected fraud cases   • prepare fraud risk reports and dashboards   • recommend fraud control and prevention measures
qualifications: • chartered accountant   • strong data analysis and ri sk assessment skills   • knowledge of fraud prevention techniques
